The celebration

Ticoya is turning up
in Punta Cana!

We are celebrating Ticoya's birthday the right way — three nights at a gorgeous adults-only, all-inclusive resort in Punta Cana, Dominican Republic. Think crystal-blue water, bottomless drinks, incredible food, and your favorite people all under one roof. This trip is going to be everything. Come through!

Where we're staying

A Luxury Adults-Only
Resort in Punta Cana

The official resort reveal is coming soon — Ticoya is still making her decision so she can make sure it's absolutely perfect. But here's what you can count on: a world-class property where everything is included, the vibes are immaculate, and the only thing you have to think about is what drink to order next.

Worth the upgrade

Xhale Club Benefits

The Xhale Club is Breathless Punta Cana’s premium tier — a resort within a resort. Xhale guests enjoy everything standard guests do, plus an elevated layer of luxury, privacy, and personalized service that makes the trip feel truly next-level.

✦✦✦
Concierge & Service
  • ✦Personalized check-in & check-out with concierge
  • ✦VIP host service throughout your stay
  • ✦Complimentary newspaper in suite daily upon request
✦✦✦
Food & Drinks
  • ✦Daily continental breakfast service
  • ✦Afternoon hot & cold hors d’œuvres
  • ✦Exquisite desserts
  • ✦Top-shelf liquors
  • ✦Private restaurant for breakfast & lunch
✦✦✦
Pool & Amenities
  • ✦Access to 2 exclusive Xhale Club pools
  • ✦Pool concierge & bar service
  • ✦Upgraded mini-bar in suite
  • ✦Upgraded bath amenities
  • ✦Pillow menu

Super easy process

How to Get
Your Spot

Everyone books individually — Amy coordinates the whole group so you're all at the same resort at the same time. Here's all you have to do:

01
Request a Quote
Fill out the short form. Takes 2 minutes.
02
Amy Sends Your Rate
Amy pulls your live rate and sends an official quote.
03
Lock It In
A small deposit holds your room. Payment plan available.
04
Show Up & Party
Amy handles everything. Just pack a bag and show up.

A note about flights: Flights are booked independently and are not included in the resort package — this gives everyone the flexibility to fly from their own city on their own schedule. That said, if you truly need help booking flights, reach out to Amy and she will do her best to assist.

⚠ Book Early — This Date Fills Fast!
February 19–22 falls during peak season and the start of several Spring Breaks, which means resort availability goes quickly. A deposit of just $50/person (or $100/room) is all it takes to lock in your spot and your rate today — final payment isn’t due until January 2, 2027. Don’t wait and lose out!
